text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Here you can manage your Veteran
Umamusume, the racers who've
completed a Career playthrough. You
can also strengthen Trainee Umamusume
and your Support Cards.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Strengthening your Trainee Umamusume
and Support Cards will set you up to
gain better results in your Career
playthroughs!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Materials used for strengthening are
mainly acquired by racing.
